children.text: $110,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2012 through 2021; and
$200,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2026.

children.heading: .—High-speed Broadband Deployment Initiative
children.label: c .—High-speed Broadband Deployment Initiative
children.text: Of the amounts made available under subsection (a), $20,000,000 may be used to carry out section 14509 for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2026.

children.heading: .—Appalachian Regional Energy Hub Initiative
children.label: d .—Appalachian Regional Energy Hub Initiative
children.text: Of the amounts made available under subsection (a), $5,000,000 shall be used to carry out section 14511 for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2026.

children.heading: .—Availability
children.label: e .—Availability
children.text: Amounts made available under subsection (a) remain available until expended.

children.heading: .—Allocation of Funds
children.label: f .—Allocation of Funds
children.text: Funds approved by the Appalachian Regional Commission for a project in a State in the Appalachian region pursuant to a congressional directive shall be derived from the total amount allocated to the State by the Appalachian Regional Commission from amounts appropriated to carry out this subtitle.
